'''Huurtons''' were large, slender, [[Canine/Legends|canine]] creatures native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]. They were characterized by [[Armor/Legends|armored]] backs and long claws, and were highly aggressive. The [[Gender/Legends|females]] were the hunters. A separate [[Species/Legends|species]] of huurtons was known as huurton howlers. Some were turned into [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborgs]] in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] installation [[The Warren (Dantooine)|Warren]], on Dantooine.

{{Creature-stub}}
